appName.x-prompt: What app would you like to containerize?

organization.description: Organization is used as prefix for image names

dockerCompose.description: Whether to use a docker-compose.yml config file or not

nodeVersion.description: Use when generating workspace and base Dockerfiles too. Version of node-alpine docker image

confFolder.description: Path to folder with config files, which will be copied into /etc/nginx/conf.d

templatesFolder.description: Path to folder with templates, which will be copied into /etc/nginx/templates
